title: Brazilian Citrusy Fruit Bowl
description: A refreshing and healthy dessert bowl filled with the flavors of Brazil. This colorful fruit bowl is perfect for warm weather and special occasions.
instructions: Wash and dry the citrus fruits, then cut them into bite-sized pieces.
In a small bowl, mix together the granola, coconut flakes, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the yogurt, honey, and lime juice until smooth.
Arrange the citrus fruits in a serving bowl or individual bowls.
Spoon the yogurt mixture over the top of the citrus fruits.
Sprinkle the granola mixture over the yogurt layer.
Garnish with chopped fresh mint leaves, if using.
